message:
Add E2E tests for basket export functionality

Create comprehensive basket export E2E tests covering:
- Download as Markdown (single file for one prompt, ZIP for multiple)
- Download as Skills ZIP
- Copy Install Command to clipboard
- Clear Basket with toast notification
- Remove individual items from basket
- Sidebar close with X button
- Basket item count display in nav header

All 10 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
